intro_text: One spoofed vendor email can reroute a six-figure client wire before anyone notices. It's the most common attack hitting finance teams, and it clears fast. Here are the 10 controls that stop it.
headline: The 10 controls that stop wire fraud

intro_text: Enterprise buyers won't sign until you pass their security review. Auditors want the same evidence. These 10 controls get you through both without stalling the deal.
headline: The 10 controls that clear reviews and audits

intro_text: Customers, auditors, and regulators all ask the same thing: can you prove you're secure? Most finance firms can't answer cleanly. These 10 controls are how you answer it.
headline: The 10 controls that prove you're secure

intro_text: Finance carries the second-highest breach cost of any industry, and one incident can cost the client list, not just the cleanup. These 10 controls keep an incident contained.
headline: The 10 controls that keep a breach contained
